text.title: PM Framework Focus Areas Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the PM Framework Focus Areas methodology end-to-end.

step.name: collect-practices-per-area
step.action: List candidate practices per area; mark which are real (evidence) vs aspirational.

step.name: anchor-evidence
step.action: Find artefact / cadence / ticket evidence per practice.
step.decision-gate: If any practice has no evidence, halt and tag as aspirational with explicit owner+date.

step.name: fill-gaps
step.action: For empty areas, name at least one placeholder practice with explicit gap note.

step.name: ratify-with-owner
step.action: Decision owner reviews + ratifies; set review_due.

step.name: publish-and-schedule-review
step.action: Publish under canonical ADR path; calendar-block the review.
